creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
This is the port of The JED Programmer's Editor w/ Japanese
support. It works fine with either ja-libslang-1.3.8.j067.1 or
-1.4.0.j0.

	For the present, this port will not install xjed on systems
which OSVERSION is prior to 400015, since it seems to segfault on
3.4-STABLE though it works fine on 4.0-CURRENT.

	I'm analyzing it to get it working on STABLE.

Fix: 

-- 
                           /
                          /__  __
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  <knu@idaemons.org>

"If you choose not to decide you still have made a choice."--tQBksHUN2YUJmqntccG0a7MQYhBNZIakq0kY888mPL13ZrO7
